---
applyTo: "wiki/**"
---

# Wiki Maintenance

Follow `ai/workflows/wiki-documentation.md` when reading or editing the project wiki.

The wiki is the project's persistent knowledge base. It describes stable architecture, domain concepts, conventions, operations, and decisions. Source code remains the implementation source of truth.

Start with `wiki/index.md` to find relevant pages. Check `wiki/log.md` when recent wiki changes matter.

When changing wiki pages, update affected pages, dates, cross-links, `wiki/index.md`, and `wiki/log.md`.
